layers.prompt_used: IMAGE 1 is the authoritative NEW PRODUCT. Preserve its exact identity, shape, proportions, colors, materials and details. IMAGE 2 is STYLE-ONLY: borrow palette, lighting, composition rhythm, background treatment and mood, but never copy its product, logo, trademark, text or distinctive props. The final image must feature only IMAGE 1's product. Product: 小米智能手机. Transferable style: dominant_colors: #FFFFFF, #C5A059, #F5F5F5, #333333, #E8DCC4; lighting: Soft, diffused studio lighting with high-key exposure; minimal harsh shadows; bright and airy atmosphere emphasizing clarity and cleanliness.; composition: Centered product display arranged on a virtual shelf; hierarchical layout with top branding/headlines, central visual focus, and bottom action bar; balanced use of negative space.; background: Textured light background resembling white European architectural walls with subtle column and relief patterns; clean, sophisticated, and neutral.; mood: Premium, elegant, professional, trustworthy, sophisticated, high-end skincare aesthetic.; typography: Mix of elegant Serif fonts for main headlines (conveying luxury) and clean Sans-serif fonts for body text and prices (ensuring readability); varied font weights and sizes to establish clear visual hierarchy; gold color used for emphasis on key benefits.; decorative_elements: Gold accent lines and borders, Rounded pill-shaped tags and labels, Dotted connector lines linking text to items, Subtle architectural relief patterns (columns, floral motifs), Distinct block backgrounds for pricing/offer info, Vertical side navigation tab. Create a premium square e-commerce hero main image, strong product focus, clean hierarchy, no copied text or logos.
